destinations.evidence: Reconstructed fulfilled async originals support Scheduled and attach provided SPC calls.
destinations.snippet: let spc_calls = vec![spc_call]; ... TransactionSigned::Scheduled(signed) => { tx.spc_calls = Some(spc_calls.clone()); ... }

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port fulfilled-async reconstruction path.
rationale: The scheduled SPC candidate is a narrow current payload-building invariant.
statement: When payload building reconstructs transactions with SPC calls, Scheduled transactions must be accepted as supported and must carry the provided SPC calls in the scheduled payload; bounded later context extends the same injection rule to Passkey transactions.
suggested_falsification_tests: Fulfilled async reconstruction for Scheduled original should preserve SPC calls.
summary: Scheduled SPC call reconstruction is mapped.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Fulfilled scheduled async reconstruction should retain TxScheduled.spc_calls.
title: Scheduled transactions preserve reconstructed SPC calls
